Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Library of Short Stories 58 upvotes, 1 comments
  2. Megadev: A Development Kit for the Sega Mega Drive and Mega CD Hardware 119 upvotes, 7 comments
  3. Tree Search Distillation for Language Models Using PPO 36 upvotes, 1 comments
  4. Mathematics Distillation Challenge – Equational Theories 35 upvotes, 1 comments
  5. A Recursive Algorithm to Render Signed Distance Fields 70 upvotes, 5 comments
  6. SBCL Fibers – Lightweight Cooperative Threads 58 upvotes, 6 comments
  7. Show HN: GitAgent – An open standard that turns any Git repo into an AI agent 105 upvotes, 15 comments
  8. Baochip-1x: What it is, why I'm doing it now and how it came about 293 upvotes, 58 comments
  9. A look inside Dialector, filmmaker Chris Marker's chatbot from 1988 14 upvotes, 0 comments
  10. Show HN: GrobPaint: Somewhere Between MS Paint and Paint.net 33 upvotes, 3 comments
  11. Bumblebee queens breathe underwater to survive drowning 88 upvotes, 22 comments
  12. Fedora 44 on the Raspberry Pi 5 79 upvotes, 21 comments
  13. Python: The Optimization Ladder 292 upvotes, 105 comments
  14. Allow me to get to know you, mistakes and all 57 upvotes, 15 comments
  15. Postgres with Builtin File Systems 51 upvotes, 13 comments
  16. 1M context is now generally available for Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6 1140 upvotes, 485 comments
  17. Show HN: Ichinichi – One note per day, E2E encrypted, local-first 84 upvotes, 28 comments
  18. Marketing for Founders 144 upvotes, 55 comments
  19. Learning Creative Coding 60 upvotes, 22 comments
  20. Launching the Claude Partner Network 114 upvotes, 50 comments
  21. Airbus is preparing two uncrewed combat aircraft 108 upvotes, 56 comments
  22. Ageless Linux – Software for humans of indeterminate age 454 upvotes, 305 comments
  23. An ode to bzip 109 upvotes, 66 comments
  24. Show HN: Han – A Korean programming language written in Rust 129 upvotes, 81 comments
  25. Changes to OpenTTD Distribution on Steam 136 upvotes, 94 comments
  26. How Kernel Anti-Cheats Work 86 upvotes, 65 comments
  27. Montana passes Right to Compute act (2025) 255 upvotes, 223 comments
  28. An unappetizing shrub became different vegetables 5 upvotes, 1 comments
  29. Starlink militarization and its impact on global strategic stability (2023) 147 upvotes, 191 comments
  30. Treasure hunter freed from jail after refusing to turn over shipwreck gold 42 upvotes, 47 comments

Last generated 1:00pm, 15 March 2026. Source here.
